xmldoc.message:
Contentful Update Tool & Extractor
https://github.com/andresharpe/cute
version 2.13.1
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--LOGIN-->
  <Command Name="login" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Login.LoginCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Login.LoginCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Run this command first to configure your Contentful profile 
along with AI and Translation Services.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="n" Long="openai-deployment-name" Value="NAME" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Azure OpenAI deployment name.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="a" Long="openai-endpoint" Value="ENDPOINT" Required="false"
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Azure OpenAI endpoint.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="k" Long="openai-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Azure OpenAI API key.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
        <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--LOGOUT-->
  <Command Name="logout" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Logout.LogoutCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Logout.LogoutCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Log out of Contentful and clear your session 
credentials.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="purge" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Specifies the content type to bulk edit.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
        <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--INFO-->
  <Command Name="info" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Cute.Commands.Info.InfoCommand"
Settings="Cute.Commands.Info.InfoCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Display information about a Contentful space.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
        <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--CHAT-->
  <Command Name="chat" IsBranch="false" ClrType="Cute.Commands.Chat.ChatCommand"
Settings="Cute.Commands.Chat.ChatCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Make the robots do the work! Interact with your space using 
cute's AI assistant.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="douglas" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Summons Douglas. He knows most things about your Contentful
space.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="f" Long="frequency-penalty" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Single">
        <Description>Reduces repetition of frequently used phrases in bot 
responses.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="k" Long="key" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Optional key for fetching a specific 'cuteContentGenerate' 
entry.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="m" Long="max-tokens" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
        <Description>Maximum number of tokens (words) allowed in the bot's 
responses.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="memory-length" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
        <Description>The total number of user and agent messages to keep in 
memory and send with new prompt.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="presence-penalty" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Single">
        <Description>Discourages reusing phrases already present in the 
conversation.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="system-prompt" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>System prompt to initialize the bot's starting 
context.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="t" Long="temperature" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Single">
        <Description>Controls randomness: higher values generate more creative 
responses.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="topP" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Single">
        <Description>TopP controls diversity by limiting the token pool for bot 
responses.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
        <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--CONTENT-->
  <Command Name="content" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Manage your content entries in Contentful using bulk 
operations.</Description>
    <!--DOWNLOAD-->
    <Command Name="download" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Download Contentful entries to a local 
CSV/TSV/YAML/JSON/Excel file.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type id.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Cute.Lib.Enums.OutputFileFormat, 
Cute.Lib, Version=2.13.1.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]">
          <Description>The output format for the download operation 
(Excel/CSV/TSV/JSON/YAML)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command to. 
Default is all.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The output path and filename for the download 
operation</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-session" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Indicates whether to use session (eg: publish only 
entries modified by the command and not all the unpublished ones).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
          <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--UPLOAD-->
    <Command Name="upload" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentUploadCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentUploadCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Upload and sync Contentful entries from a local 
CSV/TSV/YAML/JSON/Excel file.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="a" Long="apply" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Apply and publish all the calculated changes. The default
behaviour is to only list the detected changes.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type id.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Cute.Lib.Enums.InputFileFormat, 
Cute.Lib, Version=2.13.1.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]">
          <Description>The format of the file specified in '--path' 
(Excel/CSV/TSV/JSON/YAML)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command to. 
Default is all.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="m" Long="match-field" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The optional name of the field to match in addition to 
the entry ID.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The local path to the file containing the data to 
sync</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-session" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Indicates whether to use session (eg: publish only 
entries modified by the command and not all the unpublished ones).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
          <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
    <!--EDIT-->
    <Command Name="edit" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentEditCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentEditCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Edit Contentful entries in bulk with an optional 
filter.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="a" Long="apply" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Apply and publish all the required edits. The default 
behaviour is to only list the detected changes.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type ID.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="field" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The field to update.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command 
to.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>

          <Description>Indicates how many concurrent calls can be made to a

          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic

ription>

      </Option>

Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
        <Description>The total number of user and agent messages to keep in

      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="presence-penalty" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Single">

Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="p" Long="system-prompt" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>System prompt to initialize the bot's starting 
context.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="t" Long="temperature" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Single">
        <Description>Controls randomness: higher values generate more creative

      <Option Short="" Long="topP" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Single">

Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">

      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>

  <Command Name="content" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Manage your content entries in Contentful using bulk 
operations.</Description>
    <!--DOWNLOAD-->
    <Command Name="download" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Download Contentful entries to a local 
CSV/TSV/YAML/JSON/Excel file.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type id.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Cute.Lib.Enums.OutputFileFormat, 
Cute.Lib, Version=2.13.1.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]">
          <Description>The output format for the download operation 
(Excel/CSV/TSV/JSON/YAML)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command to. 
Default is all.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The output path and filename for the download 
operation</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-session" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Indicates whether to use session (eg: publish only 
entries modified by the command and not all the unpublished ones).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
          <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>

on/[/]</Description>

ription>

onments/[/]</Description>

        </Option>

          <Description>Indicates how many concurrent calls can be made to a

        </Option>

Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified

        </Option>

          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-glossary" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether custom glossary

ription>

    <Command Name="download" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand" 
Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentDownloadCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Download Contentful entries to a local 
CSV/TSV/YAML/JSON/Excel file.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type id.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[Cute.Lib.Enums.OutputFileFormat, 
Cute.Lib, Version=2.13.1.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null]]">
          <Description>The output format for the download operation 
(Excel/CSV/TSV/JSON/YAML)</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command to. 
Default is all.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="p" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The output path and filename for the download 
operation</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-session" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Indicates whether to use session (eg: publish only

        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false"

Settings="Cute.Commands.Content.ContentSetDefaultValueCommand+Settings">
      <Description>Set default value for Contentful entries in bulk with an 
optional filter.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="a" Long="apply" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Apply and publish all the required edits. The default 
behaviour is to only list the detected changes.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="c" Long="content-type-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful content type ID.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="delivery-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Delivery API (CDA) token. See 
[italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="e" Long="environment-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful environment identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/concepts/multiple-envir
onments/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="f" Long="field" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The fields to update.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="filter-field" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The field to update.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="filter-field-value" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The value to update it with. Can contain an 
expression.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="force" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether warning prompts should be 
bypassed</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="l" Long="locale" Value="CODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The locale code (eg. 'en') to apply the command 
to.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="log-output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Outputs logs to the console instead of the standard 
messages.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="management-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Management API (CMA) token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-banner" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Do not display the startup banner or the copyright 
message.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-publish" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Specifies whether to skip publish for modified 
entries</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview-token" Value="TOKEN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Your Contentful Content Preview API token. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/developers/docs/references/authenticati
on/[/]</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="r" Long="replace" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="vector" ClrType="System.String[]">
          <Description>The values to update it with. Can contain an 
expression.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="space-id" Value="ID" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>The Contentful space identifier. See [italic 
LightSkyBlue3]https://www.contentful.com/help/spaces-and-organizations/[/]</Desc
ription>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="use-session" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Indicates whether to use session (eg: publish only 
entries modified by the command and not all the unpublished ones).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="verbosity" Value="LEVEL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="Cute.Lib.Enums.Verbosity">
          <Description>Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are 
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
    </Command>
  </Command>
